---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Resume Job-Fit AI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the gap or friction you're hitting.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen. Note whether it touches Gemini logic (`analyzer.py`),
the main UI (`app.py`), a `pages/` script, or `db.py` - see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) ground rule 3 (Gemini logic stays in
`analyzer.py`).

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant (related issues, links). Flag anything that would need a
different Gemini model or a paid tier - see the Model gotcha in `CLAUDE.md`.
